name: Pizzelle Alle Nocciole
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the eggs with the sugar and salt until light.
2. Melt the butter and stir it in.
3. Sift together all the remaining ingredients except the hazelnuts, then fold them in.
4. Stir in the hazelnuts last.
5. Heat the pizzelle iron and place 1 teaspoon of batter on each imprint.
6. Close the iron and bake for 30 seconds.
7. Cool on racks.
